# Pull Request Review Report

## Verdict
Approve / Request changes / Blocked by missing evidence

State the exact feature-completeness state under
`docs/feature-status-model.md` and whether the evidence supports it.

## Scope compliance
## Product behavior
## Architecture and ADR compliance
## Security/privacy regression review
## Data/schema/migration review
## API/frontend compatibility
## Vertical-path verification
Map at least one real user action through frontend, API, companion, durable
file/schema, response, reload/restart, and test evidence. Identify any missing
segment.

## Test quality and missing cases
## Visual fidelity and accessibility
## Traceability review
List the traceability rows checked or updated and verify that paths and status
claims are real.

## Claims versus evidence
Separate local verification, GitHub Actions verification, screenshots, mocks,
spikes, and unverified behavior.

## Required changes before merge
Distinguish merge blockers from follow-up improvements.

## Accepted limitations
Record limitations that do not block the exact claimed feature state.
